line_circle_tangent_label: Which panel shows a line tangent to the circle?
Which labeled panel has the line touching the circle at exactly one point?
Find the panel where the line is tangent to the circle.
Which coordinate panel shows one line-circle tangent point?
Which labeled line and circle meet at exactly one point?
line_circle_two_intersections_label: Which panel shows a line crossing the circle at exactly two points?
Which labeled panel has the line intersecting the circle twice?
Find the panel where the line is a secant of the circle.
Which coordinate panel shows two line-circle intersection points?
Which labeled line and circle meet at exactly two points?
circle_circle_two_intersections_label: Which panel shows two circles intersecting at exactly two points?
Which labeled panel has the two circles crossing twice?
Find the panel where the two circles have two intersection points.
Which coordinate panel shows two circle-circle intersection points?
Which labeled pair of circles meets at exactly two points?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description: labeled coordinate-plane panels, each showing two plotted objects
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_selected_panel_and_inter: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1] covering the selected panel and the visible intersection point box or boxes
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_option_letter: set "answer" to the single selected panel label as a capital letter shown in the image
